title: Trump’s War Alliance With Israel Is Reshaping the Middle East. But It Carries Risks.
summary_full: President Trump is the first American leader to embrace fighting a full-fledged, joint war with Israel. Washington has tried to avoid that level of coordination in the past.
summary_public: President Trump is the first American leader to embrace fighting a full-fledged, joint war with Israel. Washington has tried to avoid that level of coordination in the past.
